capabilities_used.evidence: 她反复用减半后时间窗口判断顶部/阶段。例：[2025-04-28] “The bull run is NOT OVER... 2012: 335 days 2016: 487 days 2020: 518 days This implies the 2024 top could be around August September...”；[2025-06-30] “Q3 is here... Except in post-halving years… 2013, 2017, 2021.”
她明显接受并传播四年周期框架，同时会做修正。例：[2025-05-30] “See you all in 4 years...”；[2025-11-29] “It’s not necessarily all about the 4 year cycle. But it’s certainly all about liquidity cycles.”

她频繁把降息、流动性和加密上涨直接挂钩。例：[2025-05-29] “Interest rates will be coming down. Massive injection of liquidity.”；[2025-08-22] “Jerome Powell hints at cutting rates, crypto market pumps... Q4 is looking bullish!”
她经常把 ETF/机构买盘当作上涨核心驱动。例：[2025-08-25] “BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF is buying more BTC daily than miners produce... Math doesn’t lie” 以及多次提到 BlackRock、Wall Street、ETF 批准/流入。

她用 BTC.D 下行来定义山寨季启动。例：[2025-09-29] “Bitcoin dominance is dropping... The setup for Uptober is looking epic!”；[2025-08-24] “Alt szn incoming…”；[2025-08-24] “Bitcoin dominance at lowest level YTD... Alts about to run!”

她在下跌阶段强调等待更深折价和确认，不急着抄底。例：[2026-04-02] “Still not buying. Still waiting. Still right.”；[2026-03-29] “The DCA is almost here!”；[2026-03-30] “Now is not a bad buying opportunity but...” 后面列出战争、油价、霍尔木兹等逆风。
她强调牛市后段要逐步兑现，并警惕后期垂直加速后的剧烈回撤。例：[2025-07-30] “I’m slowly scaling out. Securing profits, securing my future.”；[2025-09-30] “We’re entering the most dangerous part of the Bull Run…”
她会把美股风险偏好作为加密先行或同步信号。例：[2025-02-28] “Over $825 billion was added to the US stock market today. Next, crypto. The recovery will be historic.”
她的宏观叙事常围绕美元流动性和政策宽松，但并未高频直接提 DXY；属于隐含使用而非显性框架，更多体现在“美元/流动性转松 -> crypto up”的表达上。
她会做明显的 regime 切换，不会永远无脑看多。例：[2026-04-09] “Most people see a 5% bounce and think the bear market is over. It's not.”；[2026-01-31] “crypto is likely to make lower lows throughout 2026.”
默认牛市思维很强，尤其在 2024-2025 多次把回撤视为趋势中的机会。例：[2025-02-27] “To be bearish right now is foolish” ；[2024-12-31] “2024 will be the last year to buy bitcoin under $100,000.”
她会用“Bitcoin is digital gold”或地缘冲突与 BTC 关系做叙事，但并不系统。例：[2025-06-26] 引用白宫官员 “Bitcoin is digital gold”；[2026-04-09] 谈伊朗、霍尔木兹与 BTC 下跌。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Scale-Out Profit Ladder
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Reduce exposure into strength instead of trying to sell the exact top. Keep a residual moon bag while systematically locking in gains through late bull-market acceleration.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在上涨过程中分批兑现，而不是试图卖在绝对顶部；牛市后段边涨边减仓，同时保留小仓位博取尾段加速。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-07-30] “Either way we're moving up and I'm slowly scaling out. Securing profits, securing my future.”；[2025-08-30] “Take profit on the way up. Leave a moon bag...”；[2025-07-31] “people would rather ride crypto down to zero than secure some profits.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Extreme Fade
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use crowd fear/FOMO as a primary trigger: buy when panic is widespread and avoid chasing when euphoria becomes consensus.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把市场群体情绪极端当作主要触发器：恐慌极致时偏买入，普遍狂热时偏谨慎，不追一致性预期。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-02-27] “Last time there was this much fear was 2022 when bitcoin hit $17,000.”；[2025-02-28] “We’re currently at extreme fear while Bitcoin is trading at $84,000... We’re going much higher.”；[2025-03-29] “There’s so much money to be made in crypto but most of you haven’t got a clue…”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Liquidity Cycle Override
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 流动性周期覆盖减半周期
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When liquidity conditions conflict with standard halving-cycle expectations, prioritize rates, policy, ETF demand, and macro liquidity over simple four-year analogs.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当流动性条件与传统减半/四年周期相冲突时，优先考虑利率、政策、ETF 需求和宏观流动性，而不是机械套用历史周期。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] “It’s not necessarily all about the 4 year cycle. But it’s certainly all about liquidity cycles.”；[2025-05-29] “Interest rates will be coming down. Massive injection of liquidity.”

personal_quirks.quote: Patience is the number 1 skill to making big money in crypto. Most people lose because they're emotional and wanna get rich quick.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把耐心视为核心 alpha，反对情绪化追涨杀跌和快速致富心态。

personal_quirks.quote: Take profit on the way up. Leave a moon bag in case the parabolic run gets violent. The game is survival + positioning. Not hopium.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 上涨阶段必须分批止盈，先活下来，再博尾段行情。

personal_quirks.quote: Most people see a 5% bounce and think the bear market is over. It's not.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 拒绝把短期反弹误判成趋势反转，先区分 regime 再交易。

personal_quirks.quote: I’ve been saying for months crypto is likely to make lower lows throughout 2026. It’s why I was very public about slowly scaling out in Q3/Q4 of 2025.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 牛市后段主动减仓，熊市预期来临前以保本和保利润为先。

personal_quirks.quote: The wildest part of crypto is FOMO and then the FEAR. When crypto pumps people run to buy at the top. When it dumps the same people won't touch it.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大众情绪是反向指标；交易上要和 FOMO/恐慌保持距离。

unique_traits: 她和典型画线型 TA 交易员不同，核心不是形态学精细入场，而是把宏观流动性、减半/周期叙事、ETF 资金流和市场情绪包装成高传播性的方向性判断。她默认牛市偏多，但并非死多头，在周期后段会高频强调分批止盈和 capital preservation。给出的 8 张“图表”附件实际上几乎全是人物/社媒内容而非 K 线，这反而强化了她更像 narrative/macro content trader，而不是纯图表派。

high_conviction_phrases: The bull run is NOT OVER
ETH about to become the play of the century
Only fools would be panic selling
Still not buying. Still waiting. Still right.
